workingAssumptions: Use the latest supplied bugfix archive as the source of truth.
Do not claim Rust source release readiness because this container has no cargo/rustc/rustfmt/clippy.
Prefer reversible proof-gate fixes and regression tests over broad runtime refactors without Rust host proof.

changes.summary: Published-binary gate now keeps the vendored-binary report path in blocked evidence, including stale-proof cases.
npm pack dry-run proof now records package entry mode/size details and fails when packed vendored binaries are non-executable on POSIX.
Added regression coverage for executable-mode metadata and non-executable vendored binary rejection.
Archive staging explicitly preserves POSIX file modes after copy.
Release archive contract now checks that the linux vendored binary is archived with executable mode when present.
Restored executable mode in the working tree after Python ZipFile extraction dropped it; final archive stores it as 0755.

confirmedBlockers.evidence: npm run verify:rust-quality exits 1; reports/rust-quality-latest.json records spawnSync cargo ENOENT.
reports/publish-decision-latest.json status is blocked because Rust/local-prepublish proof is not available.

newRegressionGuards: tests/node/verify-npm-pack.test.js: non-executable vendored binary fails packaging proof
tests/node/archive-contract.test.js: archive preserves executable bit for vendored linux binary
tests/node/product-practice-contract.test.js: stale binary proof evidence still identifies vendored-binary context
